hero.title: Practical information presented with clarity and warmth
hero.lede: Church address, parish office hours, clergy contacts, parking information, and support routes published by St Nick's.

intro.title: Keep the essentials close to hand
intro.body: The parish lists separate addresses for the church, presbytery, and parish office, plus parking, priest contact details, and safeguarding routes through the Diocese of Clifton.

cards.title: Location & Map
paragraphs: Church, presbytery, parish office, and parking details are kept in the shared parish settings.

cards.title: Office Hours
paragraphs: The homepage and footer use the same office details so parish enquiries stay consistent.

cards.title: Contact Details
paragraphs: Parish priest and office details are managed in one place and reused across the site.

cards.title: Donations
paragraphs: Use the parish giving link for St Nicholas itself, then follow the other links for St Nicholas Bread and Borderlands.
